## Summary
- What changed?
- Why did it change?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Build

## Screenshots / Video (Required for UI changes)
- Attach before/after screenshots or a short recording.

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build:web` (or explain why skipped)

## Risk and Rollback
- Known risk(s):
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commit title used
- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Changelog updated when relevant
